title: Homebuds Bathroom Scales for Body Weight, High Precision by Weighing Scales Professional Factory SINCE 2001, LED Display and Step-On, 3*AAA Batteries Included, 28st/400lb/182kg, Blue
features: AMAZING ACCURACY CHOICE - Benefiting from over 20years digital bathroom scales for body weight professional experience, we made the scale with best-in-class technology and expertise, and proudly guarantee high accuracy at 0.1lb/0.05kg increment with capacity 28st/400lb/182kg.

EASY TO USE - The weighing scales are utilized up-to-date digital technology, along with many friendly features, including: auto calibration, auto step-on, auto power off, comfortably large platform in 10.9'' x 10.9'', 3*AAA batteries included, 3 units switch: st/lb/kg.

EASILY VISIBLE LED - The weighing scales body weight are equipped with crystal clear LED in large number size, specially designed for clearly viewing numbers in any conditions, and kept the same brightness throughout batteries' lifecycle.

ORIGINAL DESIGN - The smart weight scales are our original design with the idea: Less is More, as well as the unique feature: the whole platform in elegant blue. Our entire team sincerely wishes it is not only the perfect scale for body weight, but also a perfect decoration in your bathroom, bedroom, or living room.

BEYOND OUR DIGITAL SCALES - Our company established in 2001, dedicates to developing and manufacturing high quality digital scales for body weight. Our first-class quality and social management system has been certified by ISO and Social Accountability. Homebuds: Inspired by Life, for Better Life.
description: Product Description Homebuds: Inspired by life, for better life. High Professional: Our factory is focusing on high precision technology for weighing since 2001, promise high accuracy, high precision and high contrast display in the bathroom scale's lifecycle. High Accuracy: Four high precision weight sensors work together to ensure high accuracy at 0.1lb/0.05kg increment throughout this bathroom scales' lifecycle. Simple to Use: Our body weight scale is easy to use, simple to set up. Just step on the scale and you'll get your weight number on the crystal clear LED display. Original Design: The bathroom scale's platform in elegant blue,wishes it is aslo a perfect decoration in your bathroom, bedroom, or living room. Good Assistant: This Homebuds digital body weight scale is a good assistant to help you reach your fitness goal easily and quickly. Homebuds digital body weight scale Reminder: 1. Place the scale on a secure and flat surface to get accurate weight; Inaccurate weight due to placement on uneven ground or carpet. 2. Calibration is necessary for first use, changing batteries and moving the scale. Make sure to step on to weigh after the scale display"0.0".
